sourcesContent:
import AppShell from "../components/AppShell"; import DataTable from "../components/DataTable"; import ExportCard from "../components/ExportCard"; import MetricCard from "../components/MetricCard"; import PageHeader from "../components/PageHeader"; import PrimaryButton from "../components/PrimaryButton"; import ReportCard from "../components/ReportCard"; import { FormField } from "../components/FormField"; import SectionCard from "../components/SectionCard"; const reports = [ ["Daily Vital Summary", "Daily patient telemetry overview", "Vitals, statuses, sync timestamps", "Operations", "Endpoint required"], ["Patient Trend Report", "Single-patient trend and telemetry review", "Vitals, trends, anomalies", "Clinician", "Endpoint required"], ["Patient Risk Summary", "Risk and anomaly overview", "Scores, statuses, reasons", "Clinical lead", "Endpoint required"], ["Alert Acknowledgement Audit", "Operational alert handling log", "Alert states, timestamps, owners", "Audit", "Endpoint required"], ["Device Uptime Report", "Device health and connectivity", "Last seen, stale periods, availability", "Technical ops", "Endpoint required"], ["ML Anomaly Report", "Model-generated anomaly outputs", "Scores, reasons, timestamps", "Data science", "Endpoint required"], ["Facility Health Report", "Facility service state snapshot", "Service statuses, sync health", "Management", "Endpoint required"], ["Data Quality Report", "Reading completeness and freshness", "Missing values, stale readings", "Operations", "Endpoint required"], ["Offline Device Periods Report", "Connectivity downtime periods", "Offline intervals and recovery", "Technical ops", "Endpoint required"], ].map(([title, description, contains, role, lastGenerated]) => ({ title, description, contains, role, lastGenerated, formats: "CSV / PDF / Excel", status: "Pending", exportDisabled: true, previewDisabled: true, })); const exportItems = [ "Patient Data Export", "Vital Readings Export", "Alerts Export", "Device Registry Export", "Device Uptime Export", "ML Anomaly Export", "Full Database Export", "Facility Health Export", ].map((title) => ({ title, description: "Export workflow scaffolded in UI. Backend endpoint required.", count: "Unavailable", formats: "CSV / PDF / Excel / JSON", lastExported: "Never", disabled: true, })); export default function ReportsPage() { return ( Generate Report}>
Backend endpoint required
{reports.slice(0, 3).map((report) => ( ))}
{exportItems.map((exportItem) => ( ))}
); }
